body:
### Features
- **graphql:** Add mercurius support with a top-level graphql.request span [#9142](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9142)

### Fixes
- **AppSec:** Report request headers on Lambda spans when AppSec is enabled [#9257](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9257)
- **General:** Avoid rewriter source map marker in source [#9212](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9212)
- **General:** Skip loader hook registration when instrumentation bails out [#9242](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9242)
- **guardrails:** Forward abort telemetry synchronously to avoid a hung exit [#9268](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9268)
- **instrumentations:** Preserve asyncEnd wait with code-transformer 0.16 [#9256](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9256)
- **msgpack:** Cap MsgpackChunk growth at the agent intake limit [#8672](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8672)
- **OpenTelemetry:** Wrap sdk-trace TracerProvider for sdk-node 0.220+ [#9255](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9255)
- **ssi:** Run ssi in current proposal branch [#9223](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9223)
- **Test Optimization:** Stop propagating metadata to workers [#9261](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9261)

### Documentation
- **Serverless:** Add serverless integrations skill [#9188](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9188)

### Internal (CI, Testing, Benchmarking)
- **benchmarks:** Support BP_EXTERNAL_S3_URL override [#9155](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9155)
- **guardrails:** Skip node 24 initialize runtime checks [#9283](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9283)
- **init:** Skip node 22 loader guardrails [#9277](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9277)
- **Test Optimization:** Cover msw preload regression [#9262](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9262)
- **Test Optimization:** Stabilize atf final status assertion [#9253](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9253)
- **Test Optimization:** Stabilize request error tag reporting [#9254](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/9254)
